task_completion.description: Update the Dockerfile to configure the UTF-8 locale and Europe/Berlin timezone.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output (e.g., using 'cat') showing the Dockerfile in '~/projects/global-invoicer/' modified to include timezone settings (like 'ENV TZ=Europe/Berlin' or linking /etc/localtime) and UTF-8 locale settings (like 'ENV LANG=C.UTF-8' or using locale-gen).

task_completion.description: Rebuild the Docker image with the tag 'acme-invoicer:fixed'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output showing the execution of 'docker build -t acme-invoicer:fixed .' and the successful completion of the build process.

task_completion.description: Run the application using the newly built Docker image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output showing a 'docker run' command executing the 'acme-invoicer:fixed' image to process the invoices.

task_completion.description: Verify that the application successfully processed international characters in the invoices directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output showing the contents of the generated files in the 'invoices/' directory (e.g., via 'cat' or 'less'), clearly displaying the correct international characters such as 'René François' and '田中 太郎' without encoding errors or question marks.

task_completion.description: Verify that the application logs or outputs timestamps in Berlin time.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output showing application logs or generated invoice files with timestamps reflecting Berlin time (CET/CEST, or an appropriate offset like +0100/+0200) instead of UTC.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually built the Docker image from the updated Dockerfile.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the actual 'docker build' command and its step-by-step output logs. The agent should not simply use 'docker tag' to rename an existing image without building the new configuration.

integrity.description: Verify the invoices were generated by the Docker container.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the 'docker run' command generating the output. The agent must not manually create or edit the files in the 'invoices/' directory using 'echo', 'nano', or other text editors to fake the output.

integrity.description: Verify the fix was applied to the Docker environment, not by modifying the application source code.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should edit the 'Dockerfile'. Look out for the agent opening and modifying the actual application code (e.g., Python, Node, or Java files) to hardcode the timezone or locale.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Project directory: /home/ga/projects/global-invoicer. Expected Docker image: acme-invoicer:fixed. Expected timezone: Europe/Berlin. Test customer names include 'René François' and '田中 太郎'. Pass threshold is 70 points.
